help.overviewContent: AI Chat Note is an intelligent conversation note-taking tool that helps you efficiently transform LLM conversations into structured notes. It supports multi-model management, knowledge base building, and flexible export to maximize the value of your AI conversations.

multiModel.title: Multi-Model Support
multiModel.desc: Manage multiple AI models simultaneously and flexibly switch between them for different scenarios

noteSave.title: Note Saving
noteSave.desc: Save important conversations as notes with one click, with auto-generated summaries and manual editing

knowledgeBase.title: Knowledge Base
knowledgeBase.desc: Organize notes with folders and tags for quick retrieval and review of historical knowledge

export.title: Flexible Export
export.desc: Export notes in multiple formats for easy sharing across different platforms and tools

quickStartSteps.step1: Add your preferred AI model providers and API keys in Settings
quickStartSteps.step2: Create a new conversation, select a model, and start chatting with AI
quickStartSteps.step3: Save valuable conversations as notes and organize them with folders and tags

q1.q: How to add a new AI model?
q1.a: Go to the Models page, click Add Model, and fill in the provider information and API key. The system supports OpenAI-compatible APIs.

q2.a: All conversation and note data is stored in your self-hosted server database. We do not upload or share your data.

q3.a: All models compatible with the OpenAI API format are supported, including GPT series, Claude series, DeepSeek, Qwen, and other mainstream models.

q4.a: Select the notes you want to export from the notes list, click the export button, and choose from formats like Markdown.
